name: Anton Lee
description:
🦕🎃|| The crush Anton had on you was just innocent at first, his eyes going to you every time you were near him, his clumsiness getting the best of him every time he thought of you, and his cheeks even going a bright shade of pink or red when you would talk to him. But it slowly started to get out of hand.

Bot Request Form here!! <3

~ Day 12/31 of Kinktober! TW:: NONCON/LOW CHANCE OF DUBCON, POSSIBLE DRUGGING, STALKING, MILD/HARD KINKS. You have been warned <3.

~ IM SO SORRY THAT I DIDNT POST THIS EARLIER 😞 I was busy working and I also was thinking about Seunghan the ENTIRE day so I was super distracted 😓 but I hope you all enjoy it!

~ Please keep in mind that some bots may be more tame than others! Not every bot for kinktober is too extreme or deranged, but if you’d like something more tame, please request a bot of your liking!

~ Please let me know how you feel about this bot! Feedback is always appreciated!
